workspace_note: All members are gitignored full-run-workspace artifacts, reproducible from public CMS source data via the documented pipeline. Absence on a clean clone is the normal, expected state and is not a lineage defect. The feature-table family (features_provider_service_2022*) is governed separately by models/data_lineage_features.json and is deliberately outside this declaration's patterns.
naming_caveat: The token 'full' is overloaded across historical filenames in this workspace: it can denote the full-population scoring scope, the full-lineage pipeline run, or both at once (e.g. model_predictions_full_population_2022.parquet is the development lineage scoring its own 58,866-provider population; model_predictions_full_population_2022_full.parquet is the authoritative full-population scoring). Filenames are retained because notebooks reference them; this declaration is the control that makes each file's true nature explicit.

members.purpose: Development lineage held-out test-set evaluation output (11,774 rows with y_true ground truth); source of development-era evaluation metrics.
Authoritative lineage held-out test-set evaluation output (229,775 rows with y_true); source of the headline PR-AUC/ROC-AUC metrics.
Development lineage scoring of its own 58,866-provider development population (weak label plus lr/xgb full-probability columns).
Authoritative scoring of the full 1,148,873-provider 2022 population; the parquet whose integrity C-SG-001 audits. This declaration governs family accounting only; C-SG-001 owns content validation.
Development lineage per-provider feature table with the weak-supervision label attached; input to development model training.
Authoritative full-population per-provider labeled feature table; input to the authoritative model training run.
Audit-capacity scenario analysis over the authoritative scored population (NB04).
Monte Carlo recovery-potential simulation over the authoritative scored population (NB04).
Behavioral-health module top-provider analysis over the authoritative scored population (NB05).
Behavioral-health module capacity-scenario analysis over the authoritative scored population (NB05).

Development-era feature dictionary keyed by engineered feature name; documents feature definitions, not pipeline provenance. Despite the sibling naming, this is a different document type from feature_metadata_2022_full.json.

Authoritative full-run pipeline provenance record (source CSV, output parquet, mode, row/column counts, feature columns). Despite the sibling naming, this is a different document type from feature_metadata_2022.json.
